message:
feat: add observability, pressure reporting, parser improvements, and layout optimizations

Observability Integration (fm-core):
- Add franken-kernel dependency for structured tracing
- Implement MermaidObservabilityIds (trace_id, decision_id, policy_id, schema_version)
- Add MERMAID_SCHEMA_VERSION constant (1.0.0 semver)
- Deterministic ID generation via stable_u128_hash/stable_u64_hash

Pressure Reporting System (fm-core):
- MermaidNativePressureSignals: CPU/memory/IO pressure from /proc/self/status
  and FM_PRESSURE_* environment variables
- MermaidWasmPressureSignals: frame budget, event loop lag, worker saturation
- MermaidPressureTier: Nominal (0-349), Elevated (350-649), High (650-849),
  Critical (850-1000) permille thresholds
- Unified MermaidPressureReport with telemetry availability flags

Parser Enhancements (fm-parser):
- Support escaped characters in quoted strings (backslash sequences)
- Add backtick quote support alongside single/double quotes
- Case-insensitive C4 diagram variant detection (C4Context etc.)
- Allow dash-delimited keywords (graph-lr)
- Separate actor/participant match arms in sequence diagrams
- Fix class diagram statement ordering

Layout Optimizations (fm-layout):
- Fix edge label positioning for 4-point orthogonal paths
- Revise Sugiyama cost model: (nodes*edges)/50 instead of nodes*edges*2
- Replace Vec-based ready queue with BinaryHeap for O(N log N) rank assignment
- Remove unused layout_diagram_radial_traced_dup (412 lines)

CLI/WASM/Renderer Integration:
- Export pressure and observability fields in RenderResult/ValidateResult JSON
- Wire pressure reporting into SVG, Canvas, Terminal renderers
- WASM: add PressureConfigOverrides for JavaScript init API
- CLI: sample native pressure, generate observability IDs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
